name: Oxfam America
mission:
Oxfam is a global organization that fights inequality to end poverty and injustice. We offer lifesaving
support in times of crisis and advocate for economic justice, gender equality, and climate action. We
demand equal rights and equal treatment so that everyone can thrive, not just survive. The future is
equal.
theoryOfChange: Oxfam America has a published 'Oxfam America 2030 Strategy Framework'. This framework, approved in March 2020, guides their work towards fighting inequality to end poverty and injustice. It focuses on systemic change in four key areas: economic justice & equal rights, humanitarian response, climate action, and women's rights and gender justice. The strategy also outlines a commitment to revolutionizing their approach through open and humble collaboration with partners, allies, and supporters, leveraging the power of the US for global impact, and striving to become a feminist and anti-racist organization.

scoreSummary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Strong donor fit, low risk profile, and credible supporting evidence for outcomes.

components.evidence: Asnaf: fuqara (+5); Operates in Muslim-majority regions (+3); Strong humanitarian service (+4)
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

components.improvement_suggestion: Expand services to underserved populations or geographies with limited nonprofit coverage.
components.name: Underserved Space

alignment.rationale: Alignment 34/50: HIGH Muslim donor fit, humanitarian cause area

score_details.score_summary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

zakat.claim_evidence: Organization is in zakat denylist (partners but doesn't collect directly) (Source: https://www.oxfamamerica.org/donate/)

all_citations.claim: Oxfam America holds a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100 and focuses on international relief and economic justice.
The organization works with local organizations to empower poor people to play a central role in development.
all_citations.source_name: Download our most recent financial audit

all_citations.claim: Evaluations in Ghana track metrics such as laws passed with civil society input and media competence.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Ghana Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Program effectiveness is measured by civil society understanding of technical oil and gas issues in Mozambique.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Mozambique Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Oxfam's impact includes successfully having civil society proposed amendments adopted by the Tanzania parliament.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Tanzania Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: The organization accepts general charitable donations and sadaqah to support its mission.
The organization reported total revenue of $75,339,434 and a program expense ratio of 72.3%.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a strong overall rating due to its exceptional transparency and high alignment with humanitarian cause urgency, though its direct impact score is moderated by its complex systemic-change model.
areas_for_improvement: High cost per beneficiary relative to direct-service peers
Fundraising efficiency could be optimized to reduce the $0.21 cost per dollar raised

dimension_explanations.alignment: Oxfam America shows high alignment for donors interested in humanitarian causes and systemic economic justice [1]. The organization is a well-established entity for those seeking to provide sadaqah to support long-term community development and emergency relief efforts globally [6].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization demonstrates high program effectiveness through direct service and policy advocacy, such as successfully proposing amendments adopted by parliament in Tanzania [5]. While the program expense ratio is 72.3%, the organization maintains a high data confidence level through rigorous external evaluations of its projects in Ghana and Mozambique [3][4].

baseline_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.
strengths: High financial accountability with a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100
Strong liquidity with 8.0 months of working capital
Proven track record in influencing legislative policy and civil society capacity
baseline_narrative.summary: Oxfam America is a global organization that partners with local entities to provide funds and empower individuals to lead development within their own communities [2]. The organization focuses on international relief, emergency response, and economic justice initiatives to address the root causes of inequality [1][7].

all_citations.quote: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response

rich_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a strong overall rating due to its exceptional transparency and high alignment with humanitarian cause urgency, though its direct impact score is moderated by its complex systemic-change model.

areas_for_improvement.context: At <cite id="19">72.3%</cite>, Oxfam's program ratio is below the <cite id="20">90.3% peer median</cite> for humanitarian organizations.
The organization saw a <cite id="21">9% revenue decline</cite> in the most recent fiscal year, indicating a need for diversified funding streams.

bbb_assessment.summary: Oxfam America is an Accredited Charity meeting all standards for accountability.

case_against.mitigation_notes: Oxfam mitigates efficiency concerns through its high policy impact, which creates systemic change that direct aid alone cannot achieve.
risk_factors: <cite id="25">High executive compensation</cite> totaling over $2.7 million for officers
case_against.summary: The primary concern is a <cite id="19">72.3% program expense ratio</cite>, which suggests higher administrative and fundraising costs than similar large-scale charities.

confidence.data_freshness: Data includes FY2024 and FY2025 revenue
data_gaps: FY2025 expense breakdown not yet available
confidence.notes: Very high data availability across all dimensions.

alignment.explanation: While <cite id="23">Sadaqah-eligible only</cite>, Oxfam shows high alignment for Muslim donors by serving <cite id="8">vulnerable populations in Gaza, Lebanon, and Afghanistan</cite>.
alignment.improvement: The charity could improve its alignment by <cite id="24">expanding services to underserved geographies</cite> with limited existing nonprofit coverage.

credibility.explanation: Donors can trust Oxfam due to its <cite id="9">99.99.33333333333333/100 from Charity Navigator rating</cite> and <cite id="11">Platinum Candid Seal</cite>. The organization undergoes <cite id="22">annual consolidated financial audits</cite> to ensure fiscal integrity.
credibility.improvement: To further enhance credibility, the organization could work to improve its <cite id="19">program expense ratio</cite> to align more closely with the 90% peer median.

impact.explanation: Oxfam demonstrates impact through <cite id="16">$79.01 cost-per-beneficiary</cite> and documented policy wins, such as <cite id="14">parliamentary amendments in Tanzania</cite>.
impact.improvement: Impact reporting could be strengthened by <cite id="12">expanding the number of outcome metrics</cite> beyond the current five tracked on Candid.

donor_fit_matrix.evidence_rigor: Grade B - Documented outcomes and external evaluations

grantmaking_profile.grant_strategy: Empowers local organizations by providing direct funding for community-led development.

rich_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.

ideal_donor_profile.best_for_summary: Best for donors who value a blend of immediate humanitarian relief and long-term policy advocacy to solve the root causes of global poverty.
donor_motivations: Value systemic change through legislative influence
Want to support established institutions with 80+ years of experience
Care about humanitarian crises in the Middle East and Africa
Prioritize high transparency and third-party accountability ratings
giving_considerations: A significant portion of the budget (over 30%) goes to non-program costs
The organization is currently navigating a period of revenue contraction
ideal_donor_profile.not_ideal_for: Donors seeking 90%+ program expense ratios or those specifically looking to fulfill Zakat obligations.

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: Grade B reflects <cite id="12">verified outcome tracking</cite> and multiple <cite id="26">external project evaluation reports</cite>.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: Oxfam uses an integrated approach, combining <cite id="2">emergency response with economic justice</cite> to combat poverty at all levels.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Evidence ensures that advocacy efforts translate into tangible legislative wins and community empowerment.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: Despite its size, the <cite id="21">recent revenue decline</cite> suggests a significant need for new donor support to maintain program scale.

peer_comparison.differentiator: Oxfam focuses more heavily on <cite id="4">policy advocacy and systemic change</cite> than peers like CARE USA.

similar_organizations.differentiator: Similar humanitarian scale but different advocacy mix
similar_organizations.name: CARE USA

similar_organizations.differentiator: Similar size but more focused on direct relief
similar_organizations.name: Baitulmaal, Inc.

strengths.detail: Oxfam maintains a <cite id="9">99.33/100 overall score from Charity Navigator</cite>, including perfect marks for <cite id="10">leadership and organizational culture</cite>.
The charity holds a <cite id="11">Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid</cite> and tracks <cite id="12">five distinct outcome metrics</cite> to verify program efficacy.
Beyond direct aid, Oxfam successfully <cite id="13">influenced two laws in Ghana</cite> and saw <cite id="14">proposed amendments adopted by parliament</cite> in Tanzania.

strengths_deep_dive: Oxfam America distinguishes itself through its <cite id="15">direct service delivery model</cite> which achieves a cost-efficiency of <cite id="16">$79.01 per beneficiary</cite> in humanitarian contexts. Their financial resilience is bolstered by <cite id="17">independent board oversight</cite>, with 100% of the 22 board members meeting independence criteria. Furthermore, their <cite id="18">fundraising efficiency of $0.21 per $1 raised</cite> demonstrates a lean approach to donor acquisition compared to many large-scale international NGOs.
rich_narrative.summary: Founded in <cite id="1">1942</cite>, Oxfam America has evolved into a sophisticated global institution dedicated to <cite id="2">economic justice and emergency response</cite>. The organization operates with a dual strategy: providing immediate life-saving aid during crises while simultaneously <cite id="3">empowering local organizations</cite> to lead long-term development. Unlike many humanitarian peers, Oxfam places a heavy emphasis on <cite id="4">influencing legislative policy</cite> to address the structural roots of poverty. This advocacy-heavy model is reflected in their <cite id="5">$83,115,051 in total revenue</cite> for the 2024 fiscal year. While the organization maintains <cite id="6">strong liquidity with 8.0 months of working capital</cite>, it recently faced a financial contraction, with <cite id="7">revenue declining to $75,339,434</cite> in the most recent reporting period. Despite this, Oxfam remains a critical player in global relief, particularly in <cite id="8">Muslim-majority regions like Gaza, Yemen, and Afghanistan</cite>, where they provide essential services to marginalized populations.
